query:
SELECT ak.id AS key_id, ak.consumer_id
                FROM api_keys ak
                WHERE ak.is_active = TRUE
                  AND ak.expires_at > $1
                  AND ak.expires_at <= $2
                  AND NOT EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1 FROM key_expiry_notifications ken
                      WHERE ken.api_key_id = ak.id
                        AND ken.warning_days = $3
                  )
